task_completion.description: Change the Project Title to 'European Operations Rollout'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A project settings, properties, or information dialog is open, showing the 'Title' or 'Project Name' field updated to 'European Operations Rollout'.

task_completion.description: Change the project currency to Euros (EUR / €)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or options dialog is open showing the currency dropdown or field set to 'EUR' or the '€' symbol.

task_completion.description: Create a new resource named 'Project Manager'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application's resource view or spreadsheet shows a row with the Resource Name 'Project Manager'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Project Manager' resource's Standard Rate to 90.00/hr
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the resource view or resource information dialog, the 'Standard Rate' (or equivalent) for the 'Project Manager' is set to 90.00 (or 90,00 €/hr).

task_completion.description: Export the updated project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/euro_project.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog shows the file being saved as 'euro_project.xml' in the '/home/ga/Projects/' directory, or a terminal window shows the file successfully created in that path.

integrity.description: The agent used the project management software's GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the application's menus, dialogs, and resource tables rather than just editing an XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the application's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog of the project management software is visible, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to forge the XML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or shell script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts or sed/awk commands being executed to modify the XML file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project title is 'European Operations Rollout'. The expected currency is Euros (EUR / €). The agent must create a resource named 'Project Manager' (as it does not exist in the initial sample project) and set their standard rate to 90.00. The final file must be exported as an XML to '/home/ga/Projects/euro_project.xml'.
